predictive.title: Predictive Maintenance Analytics
predictive.ai_input_placeholder: Ask the AI advisor a question...

predictive_hub.ai_msg_1: Based on recent telemetry analysis, the optical module attenuation rate of CORE-SW-A01 has exceeded the normal threshold by 2.3x. Replacement is recommended within the next 7 days.
predictive_hub.ai_msg_2: SMART health indicators for SRV-DB-04 show a continuously rising Reallocated Sector Count. The hard drive is predicted to reach critical failure threshold within 28 days. Immediate data migration planning is recommended.
predictive_hub.ai_msg_3: Has the vibration data for PUMP-MAIN-02 been incorporated into the model?
predictive_hub.ai_msg_4: Confirmed. The vibration spectrum for PUMP-MAIN-02 was updated in the prediction model on 03/27. Current vibration levels are within acceptable range but show a slow upward trend. Preventive bearing lubrication maintenance is recommended within 30 days.
predictive_hub.rec_desc_replace_fan: Fan module RPM readings show 22% degradation over the past 72 hours. Predictive model forecasts complete bearing failure within 5 days under current thermal load.
predictive_hub.rec_desc_recalibrate_power: Voltage drift detected in battery cells 3 and 7. Sensor recalibration is required to maintain accurate state-of-charge reporting and prevent false alarms.
predictive_hub.rec_desc_optimise_disk: Write endurance on SSDs in RAID array has reached 91.4%. Immediate rebalancing and proactive drive replacement recommended to avoid data integrity risk.
predictive_hub.rec_desc_firmware_patch: CVE-2024-3892 affects current firmware version. Patch resolves optical transceiver power management bug that may cause intermittent link failures under high load.
predictive_hub.action_schedule_cell: Schedule cell replacement during next window
predictive_hub.action_rebalance_raid: Rebalance RAID array; pre-stage replacement drives
predictive_hub.action_clean_optical: Clean optical path; schedule SFP swap if degradation continues
predictive_hub.timeline_desc_fan_speed: Fan speed degradation in PSU-2; potential bearing failure within 48h.
predictive_hub.timeline_desc_ups_battery: Internal resistance anomaly detected across cells 4-7. Pattern consistent with early-stage electrolyte degradation.
predictive_hub.timeline_desc_hvac: Routine filter replacement and condenser coil inspection per quarterly maintenance cycle.
predictive_hub.forecast_attention_desc: Storage Node SN-V82 has entered a pre-failure state. SMART diagnostics report multiple reallocated sectors and rising read error rates. Predicted total drive failure within 18 hours.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting Guide
troubleshooting.subtitle: Diagnose and resolve infrastructure issues with step-by-step guidance.
troubleshooting.search_placeholder: Search for issues, error codes, or symptoms...
troubleshooting.no_issues_match: No issues match your search criteria.
troubleshooting.issue_net001_step1: Verify the server is powered on and the network interface LED is active.
troubleshooting.issue_net001_step2: Check the switch port status using 'show interface status' on the connected switch.
troubleshooting.issue_net001_step3: Run 'ip addr show' or 'ifconfig' on the server to confirm the NIC has an IP address.
troubleshooting.issue_net001_step4: Test connectivity from the same subnet to rule out routing issues.
troubleshooting.issue_net001_step5: Check host-based firewall rules (iptables/firewalld) for ICMP blocking.
troubleshooting.issue_net001_step6: If the issue persists, replace the network cable and test with a known-good NIC.
troubleshooting.issue_perf002_step1: Run 'top' or 'htop' to identify the process consuming the most CPU.
troubleshooting.issue_perf002_step2: Check if the high-CPU process is a known application or potentially malicious.
troubleshooting.issue_perf002_step3: Review recent deployments or configuration changes that may have triggered the spike.
troubleshooting.issue_perf002_step4: If a runaway process is identified, attempt a graceful restart of the service.
troubleshooting.issue_perf002_step5: Monitor for 15 minutes after remediation to confirm CPU returns to normal levels.
troubleshooting.issue_hw003_step1: Identify the failed drive using the RAID controller management tool (e.g., MegaCLI, storcli).
troubleshooting.issue_hw003_step2: Check the drive bay LED indicators for physical identification.
troubleshooting.issue_hw003_step3: Verify a hot spare is available and rebuild has started automatically.
troubleshooting.issue_hw003_step4: If no hot spare exists, procure an identical replacement drive and initiate manual rebuild.
troubleshooting.issue_hw003_step5: Monitor rebuild progress and verify array returns to optimal state.
troubleshooting.issue_sec004_step1: Verify LDAP/AD domain controller reachability with 'nslookup' and 'ping'.
troubleshooting.issue_sec004_step2: Check the authentication service logs for timeout errors or connection refusals.
troubleshooting.issue_sec004_step3: Validate DNS resolution for the authentication endpoint.
troubleshooting.issue_sec004_step4: Test with a known-good service account to isolate user-specific vs system-wide issues.
troubleshooting.issue_sec004_step5: If the domain controller is unreachable, failover to a secondary DC and investigate the primary.
troubleshooting.issue_pwr005_step1: Log in to the UPS management interface and confirm the battery charge level and estimated runtime.
troubleshooting.issue_pwr005_step2: Check if the UPS is actively charging or if mains power has been interrupted.
troubleshooting.issue_pwr005_step3: If mains power is down, initiate graceful shutdown of non-critical systems per the runbook.
troubleshooting.issue_pwr005_step4: Inspect the battery pack age; replace if older than 3 years or showing degraded capacity.
troubleshooting.issue_pwr005_step5: Schedule a battery replacement during the next maintenance window if capacity is below threshold.

auto_discovery.insight_duplicates_desc: Assets synced from VMware via SNMP that already exist in inventory are recommended for merging to avoid duplicate records and management confusion.
auto_discovery.insight_unknown_model_desc: Some discovered devices have model numbers that cannot be automatically matched to known catalog entries. Manual input is recommended to improve data completeness.
auto_discovery.section_schedule_desc: Use automatic scheduling to periodically run SNMP, VMware, and IPMI discovery tasks, ensuring CMDB data stays synchronized with the actual environment and reducing manual intervention.
